name: Jellyboxd Sync
description: Two-way sync of watched, rating and favourite (movies & series) with Jellyboxd, plus a rating widget in the web client.
overview: Connect your Jellyfin server to your Jellyboxd account.

versions.changelog: Rating widget now works on Docker / read-only web folders: it is injected into the web client in memory, so it loads on both native and containerized Jellyfin (no writable web folder required). File-based injection kept for native installs.
Multi-user two-way sync: one shared key, every Jellyfin user syncs to their own Jellyboxd account (leave username empty). Faster pull (3s), fresh rating reads in the widget.

Two-way sync via plugin pull (works for LAN-only servers). One-click pairing: the plugin links/creates your Jellyboxd account and gives you a login link — no second account. Per-user token + Jellyfin username config.
